description: Read-only research audit contract over the production V0.8 engine trace. Computes nothing the engine doesn't already produce; never mutates or re-derives a production score.

score.invariant: null only when status is unavailable; never fabricated

invariants: partial-data scores are retained, never nulled
score state is captured independently of status
coverage (resolvedWeight/totalWeight/missingPalaces) is always captured, even when 0/0/[]
raw score fields (axisRawBeforeThaiTue, thaiTueMultiplier, prominenceAdjustedRaw) reconstruct the production score deterministically
palaceClampApplied/axisClampApplied are derived by comparing unclamped vs. clamped values, not assumed
